objects.name: CoAck_Projection_Model
objects.definition: A projection discipline where each CoAck updates a full canonical state (CoAck_Full) and emits context-gated projections (CoAck_Render for humans, CoAck_Ex for external surfaces).

objects.name: CoSurf_Working_Layer
objects.definition: The structured, indexable staging layer where CoFoam ideation is actively transformed into CI-usable forms prior to stabilization in CoSpine.

objects.name: CoTx_Deconflict
objects.definition: A coordination transition that scans CoBus artifacts, evaluates overlap risk, and applies claim/merge/pivot decisions to prevent duplicate or conflicting CoEx.

next: request BATCH2 or ask for publish-ready refinements
